name: The Credit World
description_short: San Jose-based credit repair company offering dispute services and credit report remediation. Staff members work directly with clients to remove negative items and improve credit scores.
description_long:
The Credit World is a credit repair service located in San Jose, CA at 90 E Gish Rd, operating Monday through Thursday from 10:00 AM to 5:00 PM. The company specializes in disputing errors and negative items on credit reports to help consumers improve their creditworthiness. According to available reviews, the company employs credit specialists (including staff members named Kam and Cam) who work directly with clients on credit remediation strategies.

The company offers credit dispute services focused on removing negative items from credit reports and raising credit scores. Based on client testimonials, they work on identifying items eligible for dispute and handling the dispute process on behalf of clients. One reviewer reported a credit score improvement to 720+ within three weeks of service, while another mentioned successful removal of multiple negative items from their report.

The Credit World differentiates itself through personalized one-on-one consultation with named specialists rather than automated services. The company appears to invest time in understanding individual credit situations and providing hands-on dispute assistance. Multiple positive reviews highlight the knowledge and attentiveness of staff members during initial consultations.

However, the company has a mixed reputation with a 4.0-star rating on Yelp from 14 reviews. While 10 reviews are positive (5-4 stars), 4 reviews are 1-star, with at least one reviewer claiming the company requested $1,500 upfront and operated without providing receipts. Potential clients should verify current business practices and fee structures before engaging, as the historical record shows disputes about transparency and upfront pricing.
address: 90 E Gish Rd #280, San Jose, CA 95112

company_info.headquarters: 90 E Gish Rd #280, San Jose, CA 95112

pros: Staff specialists (Kam, Cam) provide personalized one-on-one credit consultations
Reported credit score improvements of 100+ points within 3-4 weeks according to reviews
Successfully disputes and removes negative items from credit reports per customer testimonials
Local in-person meetings available at San Jose location
4.0-star average rating with 10 positive reviews out of 14 total
Establishes ongoing client relationships with continued dispute work beyond initial consultation
cons: Mixed reputation with 4 one-star reviews citing upfront fee requests ($1,500) and lack of receipts
Limited operational hours (Mon-Thu only, 10 AM-5 PM; closed Fri-Sun)
At least one historical complaint about inadequate documentation and payment practices
No transparent pricing information available on listing; fees appear negotiated per client
Unclear regulatory compliance history or licensing credentials mentioned on public profile
best_for: Consumers with identity theft or fraudulent accounts on credit reports
Local San Jose residents who prefer in-person credit consultations
Individuals seeking aggressive dispute strategies with dedicated specialist follow-up
People willing to pay upfront fees for credit repair services
diagnosis: The Credit World is best for San Jose-area consumers seeking hands-on, personalized credit repair with named specialists who actively dispute negative items. The main caveat is the mixed online reputation regarding upfront fees and business transparency—prospective clients should thoroughly verify current pricing practices, obtain written agreements with itemized fees and receipts before engaging, and be aware of historical complaints about the $1,500+ upfront cost structure.
services: Credit report dispute initiation and management
Negative item removal from credit reports
Identity theft recovery and account dispute assistance
Credit report analysis and remediation planning
